text:
Body Dressing Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's usual performance in their ability to put on and remove shirt or pajama top, at the time of admission. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's usual performance in their ability to put on and remove shirt or pajama top, at the time of admission. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or clean-up assistance
06 =
